print\('All models OK'\)
")

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\libya\\source\\repos\\AI\\dotnet-ai-kit" && python -c "
from pathlib import Path
from dotnet_ai_kit.detection import detect_project, _collect_signals, _score_candidates

root = Path\(r'C:\\Users\\libya\\source\\repos\\AI\\projects\\Anis.competition-commands'\)
csproj_files = list\(root.rglob\('*.csproj'\)\)
signals = _collect_signals\(root, csproj_files\)
cards = _score_candidates\(signals\)
for ptype, card in sorted\(cards.items\(\), key=lambda x: x[1].net_score, reverse=True\):
    print\(f'{ptype:<15} pos={card.positive_score:.0f} neg={card.negative_score:.0f} net={card.net_score:.0f} signals={card.signal_count}'\)
print\(\)
print\('Query-sql signals:'\)
for s in signals:
    if s.target_project_type == 'query-sql':
        neg = ' [NEG]' if s.is_negative else ''
        print\(f'  {s.pattern_name} \({s.confidence}\){neg}: {s.evidence[:80]}'\)
")

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\libya\\source\\repos\\AI\\dotnet-ai-kit" && gh pr create --base master --head development --title "Release v1.0.0: Full .NET development lifecycle with plugin ecosystem" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Release: dotnet-ai-kit v1.0.0

Complete v1.0 release of dotnet-ai-kit — an AI dev tool plugin for the full .NET development lifecycle, from feature specification to pull request.

### What's Included

This release delivers the entire v1.0 feature set across 7 commits and 497 files:

---

### Core Platform

| Component | Count | Description |
|-----------|-------|-------------|
| **Slash Commands** | 26 | Full SDD lifecycle, code generation, smart workflows, session management |
| **Skills** | 104 | Agent Skills spec compliant \(`dotnet-ai-` prefix\), cross-agent compatible with 16+ tools |
| **Agents** | 13 | Specialist agents \(dotnet-architect, api-designer, ef-specialist, test-engineer, etc.\) |
| **Rules** | 6 | Always-loaded coding conventions \(architecture, coding-style, error-handling, etc.\) |
| **Templates** | 11 | Project scaffolds \(7 microservice + 4 generic: Clean Arch, DDD, VSA, Modular Monolith\) |
| **Knowledge Docs** | 11 | Reference patterns \(event sourcing, outbox, service bus, gRPC, Cosmos DB, etc.\) |
| **Permission Configs** | 4 | Minimal, standard, full, MCP permission templates |

### Python CLI \(`dotnet-ai`\)

- **Commands**: `init`, `check`, `upgrade`, `configure`, `extension-add`, `extension-remove`, `extension-list`
- **Flags**: `--version`, `--json`, `--dry-run`, `--verbose`, `--type` \(validated against 12 project types\), `--ai` \(Claude only for v1.0\)
- **Features**: Auto-detection of AI tools, cross-platform \(Windows/macOS/Linux\), NO_COLOR support, stderr error output, next-command suggestions
- **Version**: Single source of truth via `importlib.metadata`
- **Tests**: 108 test functions across 6 files, 90% coverage

### Claude Code Plugin Ecosystem \(new\)

| Component | File | Purpose |
|-----------|------|---------|
| **Plugin Manifest** | `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` | Marketplace distribution — installable via `/plugin install dotnet-ai-kit` |
| **MCP Config** | `.mcp.json` | C# language intelligence via csharp-ls \(go-to-definition, find references, diagnostics\) |
| **Pre-Bash-Guard** | `hooks/pre-bash-guard.sh` | Blocks dangerous commands \(`rm -rf`, `DROP TABLE`, etc.\) — 20+ patterns, user-extensible |
| **Post-Edit-Format** | `hooks/post-edit-format.sh` | Auto-runs `dotnet format` on edited .cs files |
| **Post-Scaffold-Restore** | `hooks/post-scaffold-restore.sh` | Auto-runs `dotnet restore` after `dotnet new` |
| **Pre-Commit-Lint** | `hooks/pre-commit-lint.sh` | Blocks commits with formatting issues |

All hooks are toggleable, check prerequisites before executing, and skip gracefully when tools aren't available.

### Supported Project Types \(12\)

**Microservice \(CQRS + Event Sourcing\):** command, query-sql, query-cosmos, processor, gateway, controlpanel, hybrid

**Generic .NET:** vsa \(Vertical Slice\), clean-arch, ddd, modular-monolith, generic

### AI-Powered Detection

Project type detection moved from Python-based algorithm to AI smart-detect skill \(`/dotnet-ai.detect`\). Analyzes Program.cs configuration, handler behavior, and project structure to classify projects with confidence scoring.

---

### Commits in This Release

1. `f2190cd` — Add comprehensive tests for copier, detection, and extension manager
2. `c81491d` — Rewrite detection system, fix permissions, interactive configure, CLI UX polish
3. `267d662` — Enhance tool functionality with new commands, skills, and configuration files
4. `713f600` — Refactor detection tests to focus on behavioral patterns
5. `e789d27` — Add AI-powered project type detection command
6. `c4d657d` — Add Claude Code plugin ecosystem, Agent Skills compliance, hooks, MCP, and pre-release fixes
7. `6e66867` — Merge PR #2 \(plugin ecosystem into development\)

---

### Known Limitations \(v1.0\)

- Only Claude Code is supported as AI tool; Cursor, GitHub Copilot, and Codex CLI are planned for v1.1
- Extension catalog install is not yet available; only `--dev` local path installs work
- Project detection requires the `/dotnet-ai.detect` command \(AI-driven\); there is no built-in Python fallback
- Roslyn MCP tools \(semantic .NET code analysis\) deferred to v1.1

### v1.1 Roadmap

- Roslyn MCP tools \(`find_symbol`, `find_references`, `get_diagnostics`, `detect_antipatterns`, `find_dead_code`\)
- Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI support
- Extension catalog \(online/community installs\)
- PolySkill and skills.sh marketplace publishing

---

## Test plan

- [x] 108 tests pass \(`pytest tests/ -q`\)
- [x] Ruff lint clean \(`ruff check src/ tests/`\)
- [x] Ruff format clean \(`ruff format --check src/ tests/`\)
- [x] 90% code coverage \(`pytest --cov=dotnet_ai_kit`\)
- [x] CLI entry point works \(`dotnet-ai --help`, `dotnet-ai --version`\)
- [x] `dotnet-ai init . --ai claude` creates config, copies commands/rules
- [x] 104/104 SKILL.md files have `dotnet-ai-` prefix \(Agent Skills spec\)
- [x] plugin.json and .mcp.json validate as JSON
- [x] All 4 hooks executable with proper shebangs
- [x] `--type invalid` rejected, `--ai cursor` rejected \(v1.0 Claude only\)
- [x] All planning docs synchronized \(104 skills, 26 commands\)
- [x] No stale counts in active documentation

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)
EOF
\)" 2>&1)
